source_section.title_label_raw: Signage Requirements for the DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, RPK, CDD-2, and CDD-1 Zones

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements for the DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, RPK, CDD-2, and CDD-1 Zones Fascia Signs

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for the DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, RPK, CDD-2, and CDD-1 Zones Fascia Signs
provisions.text: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, RPK, CDD-2, or CDD-1 zone, the combined area of all fascia signs on a building wall shall not exceed 10% of the area of the wall that the signs are affixed. Ground Signs

sections.title_label_raw: In the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on

provisions.heading_context_raw: In the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on
provisions.text: In the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B, or in any DD, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, RPK, CDD- 2, or CDD-1 zone, a ground sign shall not exceed a height of 4.6 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on
provisions.text: Excluding the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B, ground signs shall be prohibited in the DH zone. Projecting Signs

sections.title_label_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI,
provisions.text: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, RPK, CDD-2, or CDD-1 zone, projecting signs shall be required to:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI,
provisions.text: be separated from other projecting signs on the same lot by no less than 2.5 metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI,
provisions.text: be set back no less than 1.25 metres from any side or rear lot line;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI,
provisions.text: not be located within 3.5 metres of the ground directly below; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI,
provisions.text: not exceed 2.0 square metres in area, per sign face.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI,
provisions.text: No more than one projecting sign is permitted per streetline for each premises. Abutting Zone Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Where a lot is zoned DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where a lot is zoned DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1,
provisions.text: Where a lot is zoned DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CLI, LI, HRI, UC-2, UC-1, CDD-2, or CDD-1 and abuts a lot that is zoned ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, PCF, or RPK, the following requirements shall apply:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where a lot is zoned DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1,
provisions.text: all non-illuminated signs shall be set back no less than 3.0 metres from the abutting lot line; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where a lot is zoned DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1,
provisions.text: all illuminated signs shall be set back no less than 10.0 metres from the abutting lot line. Fascia Signs for Home Occupation Uses, Short-term Bedroom Rental (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23) Uses, and Work-Live Unit Uses

sections.title_label_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone,
provisions.text: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone, one non-illuminated fascia sign, not exceeding 3.0 square metres in area, is permitted for:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone,
provisions.text: a home occupation use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone,
provisions.text: a short-term bedroom rental use (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23); or

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone,
provisions.text: the commercial use or institutional use component of a work-live unit use. Billboards

sections.title_label_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: Billboards shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: not exceed an overall height of 7.5 metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: excluding any supporting structure, not be located within 3.5 metres of the ground directly below;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: not exceed a sign face area of 18.0 square metres per side, with a maximum of two sign faces if they are affixed back-to-back;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: be set back no less than 4.0 metres from any streetline;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: not be located any closer than 30.0 metres to any property zoned ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, INS, H, PCF, or RPK;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: not be located any closer than 300 metres to another billboard;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: not cover more than 10% of any wall to which they are affixed; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: not be affixed on more than one wall of a building.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Billboards are permitted in the LI and HRI zones only.
provisions.text: An application for a billboard shall require construction details certified by a professional engineer.
